import os
import json
import qlib
from qlib.data import D

# Check data directory
data_dir = os.environ.get('RAB_DATA_DIR', '/data')
print('Data dir contents:', os.listdir(data_dir))

# Read meta.json
meta_path = os.path.join(data_dir, 'meta.json')
if os.path.exists(meta_path):
    with open(meta_path) as f:
        meta = json.load(f)
    print('Meta:', json.dumps(meta, indent=2))

# Check qlib_data
qlib_data_path = os.path.join(data_dir, 'qlib_data')
if os.path.exists(qlib_data_path):
    print('Qlib data contents:', os.listdir(qlib_data_path))

# Initialize qlib
qlib.init(provider_uri=qlib_data_path)

# Check available instruments
from qlib.contrib.data.handler import Alpha158
import pandas as pd

# Create handler for training data
handler_config = {
    'start_time': '2008-01-01',
    'end_time': '2020-12-31',
    'fit_start_time': '2008-01-01',
    'fit_end_time': '2020-12-31',
    'instruments': 'csi300',
}

handler = Alpha158(**handler_config)
df = handler.fetch()
print('Shape:', df.shape)
print('Columns:', df.columns.tolist()[:10])
print('Index names:', df.index.names)
print('Head:')
print(df.head())
print('Label columns:', [c for c in df.columns if 'label' in str(c).lower()])
print('dtypes:', df.dtypes.value_counts())
